heading: This Afternoon
text: Scattered showers, mainly near and south of Route 4.

heading: Tonight
text: Rain, with pockets of freezing rain in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Morning rain, isolated freezing rain in Quebec, tapering to spotty showers.40s north, 50s and 60s south

heading: Thursday
text: Rain south, a wintry mix north.
